title: Jomafe 800ml Airtight Glass Food Storage Square Containers Clip Lock Lid 100% BPA Free
features: Generous Capacity: Great for storing larger quantities or batch cooking.
Versatile Use: Suitable for refrigerator, freezer, and microwave (lid removed). Premium Glass Material: Oven-safe (without lid) for baking and reheating.
Space-Efficient: Stackable with other containers for organized storage.
description: The largest in the Jomafe range, this 800ml Square Glass Storage Container is perfect for families or those who meal prep in bulk. Its robust design ensures reliability for storing larger portions, making it ideal for casseroles, fruits, or meal-sized dishes.
